word: H2735 - חֹר הַגִּדְגָּד - Chôr hag-Gidgâd - khore hag-ghid-gawd' - Hor-hagidgad

sections.paragraph:
Original: חר הגּדגּד

Transliteration: chôr haggidgâd

Phonetic: khore hag-ghid-gawd'

BDB Definition:

Hor-hagidgad = "cavern of Gidgad"
  1. a desert station of Israel in the wilderness; site unknown

Origin: from H2356 and a collateral (masc.) form of H1412, with the article interposed

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
